heading: Authorities of heads of other departments and agencies
label: 3366 Authorities of heads of other departments and agencies
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the head of any department or agency of the United States is authorized to receive and utilize funds made available to the department or agency by the Director of National Intelligence pursuant to , as amended by subsection (a), and receive and utilize any system referred to in such section that is made available to such department or agency.section 3024(d)(2) of this title
notes: References in TextSubsection (a), referred to in text, is subsec. (a) of , title IV, , , which amended prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as .section 402 of Pub. L. 111–259124 Stat. 2708section 403–1 of this titlesection 3024 of this titleOct. 7, 2010
